spots.description: Grand Royal Palace is a beautiful palace destination in Tripura, situated approximately 20km from Agartala. It offers visitors a wonderful experience of the region's natural and cultural heritage, making it a must-visit location in Northeast India.
spots.travel_information: Best time to visit: October to March. Accessible by train from Agartala. Entry fee: ₹10 (Indians), ₹250 (Foreigners). Local guides available on site.
